steps.name: $("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Age')] and th[contains(text(), 'Sex')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[2]/input") should be(clickable: interactable and enabled)

steps.name: Проверка успешности создания пользователя и получение его id
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Age')] and th[contains(text(), 'Sex')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div/div/button[3]") should not be(empty: attribute value="" and exact text "")

$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[3]/input") should be(clickable: interactable and enabled)

$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have([text "Status: not pushed", 120s])

$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[4]/input") set value(The Fat Lady)
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Engine Type')] and th[contains(text(), 'Mark')]]/ancestor::table//tbody//td[5]/input") should be(clickable: interactable and enabled)
